'''Fulkes''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] with the [[Cavrilhu Pirates]] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. Along with [[Grinner]], Fulkes attempt to hunt down [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] when he infiltrated their base.

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
